goal: Phase 1 trigger-first revision-first local state model for Orun
notes: Task 0020 (M5.d hidden `orun state migrate` command) implemented + verified PASS in single-pass closure and merged on 2026-05-30T16:03:59Z via PR #164 squash-commit `17ef788` on `main`. Both required CI checks PASS on final head SHA `c3cddb7`: `Orun Plan` SUCCESS (52s) and `Harness dry-run guard` SUCCESS (13s). `go test ./... -count=1 -timeout 180s` all-green locally; `go vet ./...` clean. **M5 closed** — all four sub-tasks (M5.a→M5.d) merged on main.

Task 0020 surface: `cmd/orun/command_state_migrate.go` (~430 LOC) + `cmd/orun/command_state_migrate_test.go` (~260 LOC, 5 tests) + `internal/revision/legacy_scan.go` (~95 LOC `ScanLegacyPlanHashes`) + Option A CLI normalization in `cmd/orun/command_describe.go` (`ref=="latest" → ref=""` for describeRevision/describeTrigger). `registerStateCommand(rootCmd)` wired in `cmd/orun/commands_root.go` init(). Spec §5.1 algorithm map preserved verbatim in implementer report; spec §5.2 properties (idempotent, non-destructive, resumable) verified by tests + grep audits.

Constraints adherence audited and clean: (a) zero `.orun/...` concatenation in caller — only the store-root translation matches the existing `openLocalStateStore` pattern; (b) no new sentinel errors — only the four existing statestore sentinels wrapped via `fmt.Errorf`; (c) strict JSON decode via existing helpers (statestore.ReadRevisionIndex, revision.ResolveRevision, state.Store.LoadState/LoadMetadata); (d) Bridge mirrors only state.json+metadata.json — `bridgeMirroredFiles` not extended; (e) `WithCompatibilityWrites(false)` on migrate-side writes (we read from .orun/plans/, no need to mirror back).

Risk Notes carried into M6: (a) Unknown-hash placeholder body for orphan executions — sentinel JSON, migrate is the only writer of unknown-hash revisions by construction (CreateIfAbsent + ErrExists); (b) `hashToRev` dual-keying (canonical `sha256:<hex>` AND bare-hex stem) depends on `state.PlanChecksumShort` continuing to emit bare-hex — covered by tests but worth flagging if that helper is ever changed; (c) prior M5.c carry-forward: MirrorModeHardlink debug-fold decision still deferred to M6; (d) RunnerHooks.AfterStateUpdate sync mirror on runner goroutine still carry; (e) `internal/executionstate` coverage at exact 90.0% floor must not regress; (f) Persistent local-only environment quirk (NOT a regression): `kiox -- orun plan --changed --intent examples/intent.yaml` fails on composition-cache resolution — CI is authoritative.

`ai/proposals/task-0019-spec-update.md` Option A is now implemented in PR #164 (CLI normalization for literal `latest`). Option B (trigger-name resolver branch reading `refs/triggers/<name>/latest.json`) is intentionally deferred — larger surface change crossing the `internal/revision` boundary, flagged optional by Task 0019 verifier. Retain the proposal file as queued source of truth for whoever picks up Option B; can be folded into M6 scope or as a standalone polish task.

Next = **Task 0021 (M6) implementer** — E2E + property gates per `specs/orun-state-redesign/implementation-plan.md`. M6 covers: end-to-end Go tests exercising the full revision-first path through real fixtures, plus property-based tests for the resolver branch table and the bridge atomicity contract. No active blockers; M5 fully closed.
